data.content: Implemented the release workflow Node 24 compatibility fix in /Users/cartine/knots-690a-worktree by bumping actions/download-artifact from v5 to v7 and replacing softprops/action-gh-release@v2 with gh release create while preserving the existing tag, title, generated notes, and uploaded assets. Validation: actionlint passed; make sanity passed at 95.05% coverage; verified checkout@v5, upload-artifact@v6, and download-artifact@v7 use node24 while softprops/action-gh-release@v2 remains node20.
